question: What is the main function of the device known as the 'Chrono-Regulator'?

answers.ground_truth: The main function of the 'Chrono-Regulator' is to stabilize localized temporal distortions.
answers.original: The Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

ops.description: Xylotian starships are equipped with advanced technology, similar to the Aura-Cloak's design.
Resonant musicians are celebrated in Resonant society, which values musical harmony.
The Shadow Fen is located on the southern border of Aethelgard.
The Crystal Spires are located in the region of Aeridor.

entities.name: Chrono-Regulator
entities.description: The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

entities.name: Temporal Distortions
entities.description: Temporal distortions are rare but dangerous phenomena that the Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize.<SEP>Temporal Distortions are chaotic time anomalies that the Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize.

entities.name: External Power Source
entities.description: The External Power Source is required for the Chrono-Regulator to function.<SEP>An External Power Source is required for the Chrono-Regulator to function.

relations.description: The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.
The Chrono-Regulator requires an External Power Source to function.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator requires an external power source to function.
The Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize Temporal Distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize temporal distortions.
Historians highly seek after artifacts like the Chrono-Regulator.<SEP>Historians highly seek after artifacts like the Chrono-Regulator.
The Chrono-Regulator is made of Unknown Alloys.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is made of unknown alloys.
The Chrono-Regulator emits a Faint Hum when active.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator emits a faint hum when active.
The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
The creators' motives for designing the Chrono-Regulator remain unknown.

entities.name: Vexium
entities.description: Vexium (element 147) is a stabilized plasma used exclusively in Vexian propulsion systems.

entities.name: Peacekeeper Units
entities.description: Xylotian units that work in tandem with Guardian Orbs.

entities.name: Mat
entities.description: The Mat is where the cat is sleeping.

entities.name: Miniature Black Hole
entities.description: A miniature black hole is a highly unstable power source used by the Aegis Station, requiring constant containment and energy input.<SEP>The Miniature Black Hole is a captured and contained object that provides immense power to Aegis Station through Hawking radiation.
